title: Water level falls
text: Descriptively, the Amazon low-water window is visible first in the corrected water-level spine.

title: Low-water exposure rises
text: Descriptively, official markers are shown only where their legal meaning is documented; elsewhere P10/P02 bands are empirical markers.

title: Activity and light-loading adjust
text: Descriptively, port calls and tonnage-per-call are mechanism checks rather than causal estimates.

title: Freight spread changes
text: Descriptively, Sorriso-to-north freight can be compared with Sorriso-to-south freight around the same window.

title: Producer prices co-move
text: Descriptively, producer-price basis is shown as co-movement; incidence estimates belong to validated empirical outputs.
